images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, featuring flawless skin texture with visible pores and faint vellus hair, large expressive eyes, and a fit, curvy body. She is playfully winking at the camera with a cute yet seductive expression, dressed in an unbuttoned beige trench coat worn over a form-fitting, sheer lace bodysuit that accentuates her slim waist and ample chest, the fabric textures blending silk and delicate transparency. She stands in a steamy bathroom filled with swirling water vapor, illuminated by bright, clear fairy lights bokeh that create a magical, professional atmosphere without heavy shadows. The background is a blurred, high-end modern interior with cool blue city tones reflecting off the wet surfaces, evoking an elegant and sophisticated cyberpunk sci-fi vibe. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
